mapper.delete:
/* SQL ID : SrvyRspnsDAO.srvyQstnListRspnsDelete 설 명 : 설문문항목록답변삭제 */ DELETE FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_RSPNS WHERE SRVY_QSTN_ID IN
#{item.srvyQstnId}
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : SrvyRspnsDAO.srvyExcelDownQstnList 설 명 : 설문엑셀다운문항목록 */ SELECT A.SRVY_ID , A.SRVYPPR_ID , A.SRVY_SEQNO , B.SRVY_QSTN_ID , B.QSTN_TTL , B.QSTN_SEQNO , B.QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD , C.SRVY_VWITM_ID , C.VWITM_CTS , C.VWITM_SEQNO FROM TB_LMS_SRVYPPR A JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_QSTN B ON A.SRVYPPR_ID = B.SRVYPPR_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_VWITM C ON C.SRVY_QSTN_ID = B.SRVY_QSTN_ID AND B.QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD = 'LEVEL' WHERE A.SRVY_ID IN (SELECT SRVY_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' AND (SRVY_ID = #{srvyId} OR UP_SRVY_ID = #{srvyId})) ORDER BY A.SRVY_ID, A.SRVY_SEQNO, B.QSTN_SEQNO, C.VWITM_SEQNO

/* SQL ID : SrvyRspnsDAO.srvyExcelDownQstnRspnsList 설 명 : 설문엑셀다운문항답변목록 */ SELECT A.SRVY_ID , A.USER_ID , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID) AS USERNM , D.SRVYPPR_ID , B.SRVY_QSTN_ID , B.SRVY_VWITM_ID , CASE WHEN E.ETC_INPTYN = 'Y' THEN B.RSPNS ELSE E.VWITM_CTS END AS VWITM_CTS , F.LVL_CTS , F.SRVY_QSTN_VWITM_LVL_ID , D.SRVY_SEQNO , C.QSTN_SEQNO , CASE WHEN C.QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD = 'LEVEL' THEN E.VWITM_SEQNO ELSE NULL END AS VWITM_SEQNO FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP A JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_RSPNS B ON A.SRVY_PTCP_ID = B.SRVY_PTCP_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_QSTN C ON B.SRVY_QSTN_ID = C.SRVY_QSTN_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_SRVYPPR D ON C.SRVYPPR_ID = D.SRVYPPR_ID AND A.SRVY_ID = D.SRVY_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_VWITM E ON B.SRVY_QSTN_ID = E.SRVY_QSTN_ID AND B.SRVY_VWITM_ID = E.SRVY_VWITM_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_QSTN_VWITM_LVL F ON F.SRVY_QSTN_ID = B.SRVY_QSTN_ID AND F.SRVY_QSTN_VWITM_LVL_ID = B.SRVY_QSTN_VWITM_LVL_ID WHERE A.SRVY_ID IN (SELECT SRVY_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' AND (SRVY_ID = #{srvyId} OR UP_SRVY_ID = #{srvyId})) ORDER BY A.SRVY_ID, A.USER_ID, D.SRVY_SEQNO, C.QSTN_SEQNO
